name: Olive Garden Eggplant Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice mozzarella cheese.
2. Moisten the eggplant and coat lightly with flour.
3. Quickly brown slices in hot oil, dusting each side generously with seasoned salt.
4. When fork-tender and golden brown, transfer to a jelly roll pan. Cover loosely with foil and bake at 375°F for about 20-25 minutes or until tender.
5. Use 8 slices of eggplant for this amount of sauce.
6. SAUCE: Combine Prego sauce, grape jelly, and broken-up tomatoes (using a fork). Heat on medium until piping hot. Do not boil; ensure the jelly is melted.
7. Arrange 2 slices of eggplant on each of 4 plates. Cover each with 1 slice of mozzarella.
8. Ladle sauce over all, but do not cover completely.
9. Place plates in a preheated oven at 375°F for just long enough to melt the cheese and serve promptly.
